top_signals.title: ECB Is in ‘Good Position’ After June Rate Hike, Moulin Says
top_signals.summary: The European Central Bank is in a comfortable situation after last month’s interest-rate increase as the falling oil price eases price pressures in the euro zone, Governing Council member Emmanuel Moulin said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Gulf Carriers Eye Boeing, Airbus Jets as Air India Weighs Delays
top_signals.summary: Airlines in the Persian Gulf are looking to snap up earlier delivery slots for Boeing Co. and Airbus SE aircraft that may be freed up as Air India Ltd. discusses potentially deferring some orders, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump Allies Push to Reshape Fed | The Pulse 7/3/2026
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Kokou Agbo-Bloua, SocGen CIB Global Head of Economics, Cross-Asset & Quant Research; Philippe Aghion, Nobel Prize in Economics Winner; Estelle Brachlianoff, Veolia CEO (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Weak jobs growth and easing oil prices reinforce expectations for Fed pause, analysts say - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Weak jobs growth and easing oil prices reinforce expectations for Fed pause, analysts say  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
